programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dog groomer Nico is after the perfect partner to get her all hot under the collar, while care worker Patrice wants a divine angel who can also be a horny devil in the bedroom.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The latest celebrity news round-up and gossip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jeremy is a pastor with a hanging growth in an embarrassing location. Todd has a bump protruding from his forehead that is painful and humiliating. S4/Ep4

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching: Starstruck, The Home Edit, Made in Chelsea, SAS, This Is Going to Hurt, Dynasties II, and Pam & Tommy.

programme.title: Black Sea
programme.desc: Jude Law stars in Kevin Macdonald's undersea heist. A gang of British and Russian salvage experts aim to illegally snatch gold from a sunken WWII submarine.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they make the finest Panama hats? Who rounds up Florida's escaped pythons? How do they keep drivers safe in the world's longest tunnel? S9/Ep3

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who's high on drugs and has a badly broken arm, a woman showing signs of sepsis and a two-year-old who's struggling to breathe. (S9 Ep4/10)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the 13-year-old daughter of an intensely religious family in a long-running reality-TV show is revealed to be pregnant, the team must determine who is the father.
The 13-year-old daughter of a religious family is pregnant.

programme.title: Scam City: Don't Get Caught Out!
programme.desc: Conor Woodman goes deep undercover in the world's most popular cities to expose tourist scams. This episode explores New Orleans and the culturally bespoke scams unique to this city. (S2 Ep1)

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Prisoners
programme.desc: Tyler Davis Bingham started out as a petty criminal but ended up leader of one of the most brutal and feared prison gangs in the US prison system; he was a fearless fighter who would never allow anyone to live.
Tyler Davis Bingham started out as a petty criminal but ended up leader of a brutal gang.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Fast-paced action crime comedy film starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence, 1995. Things get complicated when two police partners assume each other's identity during a case.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: Lee and LeAnn head to Indio Maiz after a deadly hurricane hits Nicaragua. With no shelter from the fallen canopies, how will they survive in the desolate rainforest? S4/Ep2

programme.title: Murder On CCTV
programme.desc: When student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in a hotel room in Boston, police use cameras to find her killer and are shocked by what they uncover. S5/Ep2

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter serve up recipes including monster beef ribs from Las Vegas, a waffle-hamburger mashup from Atlanta and pizza and wings from San Antonio. S33/Ep11

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House...
programme.desc: ...Is Haunted. Paul Chuckle feels his late brother Barry is close, but lurking in the dark is not a kindred spirit. The team find a sinister past to Paul's property. S3/Ep3

programme.title: Prisoner: Cell Block H
programme.desc: Vera is livid as former Vietnam vet Jim Fletcher arrives to start work as the new Deputy Governor. Monica becomes disruptive when her parole is turned down.
Monica becomes disruptive when her parole is turned down.

programme.title: Crime Scene Cleaners
programme.desc: A London teen is stabbed to death and left inside a rental car. In Louisiana, a meth lab threatens to explode. And a Phoenix pedestrian is mowed down in a devastating road collision.

programme.title: History's Most Shocking
programme.desc: Whale Eats Kayakers, Trucks Vs. Trains, Flames & Cranes & Historic Eiffel Tower Jump: A worker is trapped on a burning building's ledge, and kayakers are swallowed by a whale.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Fast-paced action crime comedy film starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence, 1995. Things get complicated when two police partners assume each other's identity during a case.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A round up of all the latest news from the UK and around the world.
